name: ai-platform
description: Full-stack AI platform: LibreChat + MCP + React + Node.js Gateway

scripts.install:all: npm i && cd api-gateway && npm i && cd ../react-app && npm i && cd ../mcp-servers/tools-server && npm i && cd ../db-server && npm i
scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,react,mcp-tools,mcp-db -c cyan,blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:react" "npm run dev:mcp-tools" "npm run dev:mcp-db"
scripts.build:all: cd api-gateway && npm run build && cd ../react-app && npm run build && cd ../mcp-servers/tools-server && npm run build && cd ../db-server && npm run build
scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:3080/api/health && echo '' && curl -s http://localhost:4000/health && echo '' && curl -s http://localhost:3001/health && echo '' && curl -s http://localhost:3002/health
scripts.test: cd api-gateway && npm test && cd ../react-app && npm test
